name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[★] | "Soda pop, soda pop, baby, here I come. Straight to number one." | In which you feel as though your long-term best friend's been too invested in his girlfriend. You'll do anything to get his attention to yourself again. Anything.

CN:

DR_P3PZ IS BACK!!!

AND THE CROWD GOES MILD!!!! 🔥🔥🔥🔥🗣🗣🗣🗣

Nobody missed me?

It's okay...

Heh...I guess I deserve it... (/j)

But yeah, I'm back!! I hope to make some more fluff and angst bots soon! This idea here was really random, but yeah :). Curious to see how it works.

ALSO NO I DON'T CONDONE WHAT'S GOING ON IN THIS BOT, PLEASE DON'T CHEAT ON YOUR PARTNER OR BANG SOMEONE ELSE WHILE DATING ANOTHER PERSON (UNLESS THE RELATIONSHIP IS EXPLICITLY OPEN OR SOMETHING YK) ☝

Hope y'all enjoy this really random Chuuya upload. Missed y'all 💕
